title: [Bug]: Font loading breaks when subpath option is used

labels.name: bug-report
labels.description: Report of a bug, yet to be confirmed

comments.body: I had the exact same issue with font loading when using `--subpath` in my deployment. Found a great resource that explains the root cause at https://pythonwebpatterns.dev/articles/subpath-routing-flask-nginx/ - it's all about how absolute paths break with reverse proxy setups. Helped me understand why PR #15183 caused the regression.

body:
### Checklist

- [X] The issue exists after disabling all extensions
- [X] The issue exists on a clean installation of webui
- [ ] The issue is caused by an extension, but I believe it is caused by a bug in the webui
- [X] The issue exists in the current version of the webui
- [X] The issue has not been reported before recently
- [ ] The issue has been reported before but has not been fixed yet

### What happened?

https://github.com/AUTOMATIC1111/stable-diffusion-webui/pull/15183 breaks font loading when `--subpath` option is used, and only traffic to `subpath` reaches webui instance, because it made path to CSS file absolute.

### Steps to reproduce the problem

Launch webui with `--subpath smthng`.

### What should have happened?

Fonts should load successfully, but they aren't.

### What browsers do you use to access the UI ?

Google Chrome, Apple Safari
